category_description: Route reject codes: venue enablement, ClOrdID dedup, quote staleness, and replace throttling.

fixtures.title: Venue not enabled for instrument
fixtures.trigger_condition: An order routes an equity to XLON (London Stock Exchange) but the instrument's primary listing is XNYS and XLON is not in the instrument's enabled venues list.

expected_reject.message: Venue XLON is not enabled for instrument BBG000B9XRZ4 (AAPL). Enabled venues: XNYS, XNAS, XCBO.

fixtures.remediation: Route the order to one of the instrument's enabled venues, or contact the reference data team to onboard XLON for this instrument.

fixtures.title: Venue not enabled for desk
fixtures.trigger_condition: The EM-RATES-DESK attempts to route an order to MarketAxess (MAXX) but has no enablement record for that venue.

expected_reject.message: Venue MAXX is not enabled for desk EM-RATES-DESK. Enabled venues: TRADEWEB, BLOOMBERG-SEF, BROKERTEC.

fixtures.remediation: Contact the venue-enablement team to onboard EM-RATES-DESK to MarketAxess, or route via an enabled venue.

fixtures.title: ClOrdID collision
fixtures.trigger_condition: A NewOrderSingle arrives with ClOrdID='ORD-2026-0601-A' but this exact ClOrdID was already used within the 24-hour dedup window on the same FIX session.

expected_reject.message: ClOrdID 'ORD-2026-0601-A' collision on session FIX-BUY01: first seen at 09:15:00Z (within 24h dedup window).

fixtures.remediation: Generate a new unique ClOrdID for each order; consider including a timestamp or UUID suffix to avoid collisions.

fixtures.title: Stale quote
fixtures.trigger_condition: An order references QuoteID QT-TW-5511 whose timestamp is 45 seconds old, exceeding the venue's 30-second staleness threshold.

expected_reject.message: Quote QT-TW-5511 is stale: 45s old (threshold 30s). Price may have moved; order held pending operator review.

fixtures.remediation: Request a refreshed quote from the venue; or configure a shorter quote-validity window on the venue adapter.

fixtures.title: Replace throttled
fixtures.trigger_condition: The SOR sends a 6th cancel/replace request for route RTE-00400 within 1 second, exceeding the venue's 5-per-second replace cap.

expected_reject.message: Replace throttled on route RTE-00400 (XNAS): 6 replaces in 1s exceeds cap of 5/s. Message queued.

fixtures.remediation: Reduce the frequency of cancel/replace messages; implement client-side rate limiting or use the SOR's built-in replace consolidation.
